params.name: Pompeii
params.description:
On Dec 18, 1833 AD, artist Bryullov finished the Pompeii.
Pompeii is a painting by the Russian painter Bryullov that depicts the doom that a volcanic eruption brought upon Pompeii. In the painting, the volcano is on fire, tall buildings are collapsing, and people wear horrified expressions while running for their lives. The painting is epic and has a complex composition. Through several groups of Pompeii citizens, the horror, environment, and action are effectively conveyed. The painter combi …
